evidence_summary: Round-234 stays inside the selected milestone-4 Sigma binder-safety scope, keeps ForallSpec unchanged with binder count derived from fsBounds, replaces the remaining Sigma !!-based binder reads with checkedReorderBinderPair in both bubbleReorderTo variants, adds explicit InstantiationError regressions plus preserved non-front-binder Phi coverage, keeps the new reorderSpineTo helper inside private mlf2-internal test support only, leaves witness-constructor/public/cabal surfaces unchanged, and passes git diff --check, focused Sigma/Phi selectors, and cabal build all && cabal test with 2572 examples and 0 failures. Together with round-233's approved Phi/VSpine totalization, this closes the known milestone-4 binder-safety scope, so status-only closeout should move milestone-4 from in-progress to done.

completion_pointers.text: round-234 removed the remaining Sigma partial binder-order indexing, added explicit InstantiationError regressions for missing and short source binder orders, and together with round-233 closes milestone-4 while keeping ForallSpec binder count derived from fsBounds.

history_entries.text: round-234 completed milestone-4 by totalizing Sigma binder reordering, preserving the fsBounds-derived ForallSpec contract, and passing focused Sigma/Phi selectors plus the full cabal gate.
